alerts.name: High Error Rate
alerts.query: SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM logs.events WHERE level IN ('Error', 'Fatal') AND timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE
alerts.subject: [ALERT] High error rate detected

alerts.name: Payment Service Failures
alerts.description: Any fatal errors from payment service
alerts.query: SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM logs.events WHERE source = 'payment-service' AND level = 'Fatal' AND timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE
alerts.subject: [CRITICAL] Payment service fatal error

alerts.name: Service Gone Quiet
alerts.description: No logs from order-service in 10 minutes
alerts.query: SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM logs.events WHERE source = 'order-service' AND timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
alerts.subject: [ALERT] order-service has stopped logging
